name: Sendible
tagline: Social media management platform built for agencies
description: Sendible is a social media management platform designed specifically for agencies and teams managing multiple clients. It offers scheduling, content creation tools, client dashboards, approval workflows, and white-label reporting — making it one of the most agency-friendly Hootsuite alternatives available.
pros: Supports many platforms including Google My Business
cons: UI feels dated compared to newer tools
Analytics less advanced than Sprout Social
Per-user pricing adds up for large teams
